Package com.stzteam.mars.models

Class SubsystemBuilder<D extends Data<D>,A extends IO<D>>

java.lang.Object
com.stzteam.mars.models.SubsystemBuilder<D,A>
Type Parameters:
D - The data structure representing the subsystem's inputs.
A - The IO interface representing the hardware actor.
public class SubsystemBuilder<D extends Data<D>,A extends IO<D>> extends Object
A fluent builder for constructing ModularSubsystem instances. This class ensures that all necessary components (IO actors, data structures, and requests) are properly configured before the subsystem is instantiated and registered.

  • Method Details

    • setup

      public static <D extends Data<D>, A extends IO<D>> SubsystemBuilder<D,A> setup()
      Initializes a new builder instance.
      Type Parameters:
      D - The input data type.
      A - The hardware IO type.
      Returns:
      A new, empty SubsystemBuilder.

    • key

      public SubsystemBuilder<D,A> key(String key)
      Sets the unique string identifier for the subsystem.
      Parameters:
      key - The name/key of the subsystem (e.g., "Shooter", "Swerve").
      Returns:
      The current builder instance for chaining.

    • hardware

      public SubsystemBuilder<D,A> hardware(A actor, D inputs)
      Binds the hardware interface and data structure to the subsystem.
      Parameters:
      actor - The instantiated IO layer (real or simulated).
      inputs - The data object where hardware readings will be stored.
      Returns:
      The current builder instance for chaining.

    • request

      public SubsystemBuilder<D,A> request(Request<D,A> req)
      Sets the default or initial request the subsystem will run upon boot.
      Parameters:
      req - The starting Request (usually an Idle or Stop state).
      Returns:
      The current builder instance for chaining.

    • telemetry

      public SubsystemBuilder<D,A> telemetry(Telemetry<D> tel)
      Attaches a telemetry implementation to broadcast the subsystem's data.
      Parameters:
      tel - The Telemetry instance.
      Returns:
      The current builder instance for chaining.
